[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0011100 3
1 1100110 4
2 0011001 3
3 1111000 4
4 1111101 6
5 1011000 3
6 0011101 4
7 1111110 6

01 10 1010101 4
12 21 0000101 2
23 32 0000100 1
34 43 1111010 5
45 54 1111111 a
56 65 1100001 3
67 76 0011101 4 match 6
70 07 0101101 4

02 20 1010000 2
13 31 0000001 1
24 42 1111110 6 match 7
35 53 0000101 2
46 64 0011110 4
57 75 1111100 5
60 06 0110000 2
71 17 1111000 4 match 3

14 41 1111011 6

36 63 1100100 3
47 74 0000011 2
50 05 1010001 3
61 16 1100101 4
72 27 1111101 6 match 4

26 62 1100000 2
37 73 1111001 5
